reason: Cross-cell-line morphological CRISPR data does not exist in the JUMP ecosystem. cpg0000-jump-pilot contains only source_4 (one cell line). cpg0016-jump CRISPR is only source_13 (U2OS). The pre-registration assumed two cell lines; this assumption was incorrect.
implication: The validity crack (plate replicates measure technical reproducibility, not biological context-dependence) remains open. No publicly available dataset provides cross-cell-line CRISPR morphological profiles for directional validation of the essentiality sign-flip.
